about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: Dedicated to crafting exceptional digital experiences through innovative technology solutions
summaryParagraphs: Full-Stack Developer with 1+ years of experience in building scalable and responsive web applications using React, Next.js, and Node.js. Skilled in crafting clean user interfaces, integrating RESTful APIs, and implementing AI-powered features.
I hold a Bachelor's in Computer Science with strong problem-solving abilities and a passion for developing impactful, user-centric software that makes a difference in people's lives.
